comment.body:
When market is macro blind global asset allocators, some L/S pods cut gross, reduce net and trade less. The remaining algos trade price action, order-flow, vol. On top of that we got long only managers, passive allocations, model portfolios, some systematic strategies. 
Your thesis makes sense, Alma, but more nuanced. Micro beats macro here. The relative influence of those "organic participants" shrinks versus passive and algorithmic flow. The tape becomes more technicals-driven and less anchored by macro ‘fair value’ calls. 2019 style
comment.raw_body:
